hero_title: Prioritize What Matters. Ship What Counts.
hero_subtitle: WSJF Planning gives enterprise Agile teams a data-driven platform for PI Planning — from WSJF scoring and stakeholder voting to skill management, roadmaps, and delivery tracking. One tool for the entire planning cycle.
hero_social_proof: Trusted by Agile teams running SAFe, Scrum, and Kanban
trust_label: Built for modern enterprise Agile frameworks
problem_title: PI Planning is still a spreadsheet nightmare.
problem_text: Teams juggle dozens of spreadsheets, Miro boards, and email threads to prioritize features, allocate capacity, and track commitments. Skill gaps go unnoticed, dependencies break sprints, and stakeholders never see the full picture.
solution_title: One platform — from scoring to delivery.
solution_text: WSJF Planning combines the Weighted Shortest Job First framework with project management, skill tracking, and delivery analytics in a single tool. Your team scores, votes, plans, and ships — all in one place.
features_title: Everything your team needs for PI Planning — and beyond
features_subtitle: From backlog prioritization to team skill management — a complete platform for enterprise Agile teams.
feat_wsjf_text: Calculate WSJF scores using Business Value, Time Criticality, Risk Reduction, and Job Size. Individual and consensus voting built in.
feat_voting_text: Run live voting sessions with Product Owners, Architects, and stakeholders. Scores aggregate automatically — no spreadsheets needed.
feat_pi_text: Plan iterations with capacity allocation, PI objectives, ROAM risk management, and team commitments — everything for a successful PI Planning event.
feat_board_text: Visualize feature flow on a drag-and-drop Kanban board. Track status transitions from funnel through analysis to done.
feat_roadmap_text: Build visual roadmaps to align teams on delivery timelines. Communicate the big picture to stakeholders and leadership.
feat_projects_text: Manage projects with team assignments, skill requirements, and feature tracking. Get a portfolio-level view of what's planned and delivered.
feat_skills_text: Define skills with proficiency levels, assign them to team members, and specify requirements on projects and features.
feat_skillmatrix_text: Instantly see whether your team covers the skills a project needs. Color-coded gap analysis highlights missing competencies.
feat_dependencies_text: Map feature dependencies and lineage across teams. Spot cross-team blockers before they derail your PI.
feat_dordod_text: Define quality gates with Definition of Ready and Definition of Done checklists. Ensure consistent standards across all teams.
feat_enterprise_text: Fully isolated workspaces per organization with Google SSO, role-based access (Admin, Planner, Voter), and per-seat billing.
feat_reporting_text: Track velocity, commitment accuracy, and score distributions. Export CSV reports for leadership reviews and ART sync meetings.
steps_title: From setup to prioritized backlog in minutes
step1_text: Register and set up your organization's workspace in seconds. Multi-tenant isolation means your data stays yours.
step2_text: Add Product Owners, Architects, and stakeholders with the right roles. Voters can join without a full account.
step3_text: Import or create backlog items. Define skill requirements, dependencies, and assign to programs or iterations.
step4_text: Facilitate live WSJF scoring with your team. Everyone votes; scores are tallied automatically.
step5_text: Export a rank-ordered backlog with WSJF scores. Track delivery on the board and roadmap.
pricing_feat_nocc: No credit card required to start
pricing_note: Billed monthly per active seat · No lock-in
security_title: Built for organizations that care about data.
security_isolation_text: Every organization's data is fully isolated. No cross-tenant data leakage by design.
security_rbac_text: Granular permissions at every level. Control who reads, writes, and votes.
security_privacy_text: Hosted in the EU. GDPR-compliant. Your backlog data never leaves your control.
